title: waf-config-versions
description: Contains details about a security configuration's versions.

configName.description: The name you assigned to the security configuration.

lastCreatedVersion.description: The version number of the security configuration that you created most recently.

pageSize.description: Represents the number of items per page.

productionActiveVersion.description: The version number of the security configuration that is currently active on the production network.

productionExpediteRequestId.description: Uniquely identifies the expedite activation request of the configuration version on the production network.

stagingActiveVersion.description: The version number of the security configuration that is currently active on the staging network.

stagingExpediteRequestId.description: Uniquely identifies the expedite activation request of the configuration version on the staging network.

totalSize.description: The total number of configuration versions.

basedOn.description: The version from which you cloned this version.

createDate.description: The date when you created the configuration version.

createdBy.description: The user who created the configuration version.

production.description: Contains details about the version's activation in the production network.

action.description: The action taken on the configuration version, either `ACTIVATE` or `DEACTIVATE`.

status.description: The activation status of the configuration version. Either `Pending`, `Active`, `Inactive`, `Deactivated`, or `Failed`.

staging.description: Contains details about the version's activation in the staging network.

action.description: The action taken on the configuration version, either `ACTIVATE` or `DEACTIVATE`.

status.description: The activation status of the configuration version. Either `Pending`, `Active`, `Inactive`, `Deactivated`, or `Failed`.

versionNotes.description: The notes you entered for the configuration version.
